creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #7)
Can you please publish your OPTIONS? I have just tried without any poudriere, just classical "cd /usr/ports/default/security/ipsec-tools ; make" with the same error. 

My list:

===> The following configuration options are available for ipsec-tools-0.8.2_2:
     ADMINPORT=off: Enable Admin port
     DEBUG=on: Build with debugging support
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     DPD=on: Dead Peer Detection
     EXAMPLES=on: Build and/or install examples
     FRAG=on: IKE fragmentation payload support
     HYBRID=on: Hybrid, Xauth and Mode-cfg support
     IDEA=off: IDEA encryption (patented)
     IPV6=on: IPv6 protocol support
     LDAP=off: LDAP authentication (Xauth server)
     NATT=off: NAT-Traversal (kernel-patch required)
     NATTF=off: require NAT-Traversal (fail without kernel-patch)
     PAM=off: PAM authentication (Xauth server)
     RADIUS=on: Radius authentication (Xauth server)
     RC5=off: RC5 encryption (patented)
     SAUNSPEC=off: Unspecified SA mode
     STATS=off: Statistics logging function
     WCPSKEY=on: Allow wildcard matching for pre-shared keys
====> GSSAPI Security API support: you have to select exactly one of them
     GSSAPI_BASE=on: GSSAPI support via base system (Kerberos required)
     GSSAPI_HEIMDAL=off: GSSAPI support via security/heimdal
     GSSAPI_MIT=off: GSSAPI support via security/krb5
     GSSAPI_NONE=off: Disable GSSAPI support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
